heroHighlight.title: Fruit of the Spirit Coloring Pack
heroHighlight.description: A bestselling set with joyful fruit characters, simple Scripture tie-ins, and printable pages that work beautifully for home or classroom use.

valueProps.title: Instantly printable
valueProps.description: Customers can buy today and print right away without waiting for shipping.

valueProps.title: Faith-filled themes
valueProps.description: From Bible stories to Scripture memory, every collection keeps the message front and center.

valueProps.title: Bright and playful
valueProps.description: Color palettes, shapes, and cheerful compositions feel energetic without becoming chaotic.

valueProps.title: Made for real homes
valueProps.description: Perfect for busy bags, homeschool stations, church classes, and kitchen table creativity.

steps.title: Pick your favorite pack
steps.description: Browse bright faith-based collections organized for family use, class time, and seasonal moments.

steps.title: Checkout with Stripe
steps.description: Send customers through a secure mobile-friendly Stripe checkout experience with promo code support.

steps.title: Deliver and print
steps.description: Customers complete checkout and land on a secure page where they can download the files attached to their product.

faqs.question: Are these physical products?
faqs.answer: No. Every item in the shop is a digital download, so you can check out and start printing right away.

faqs.question: How do customers receive their files?
faqs.answer: After payment, customers are returned to a secure order-success page where the files attached to that product are available to download.

faqs.question: Can I update products without editing code?
faqs.answer: Yes. Admin can update product details, images, downloads, and featured settings from the dashboard.

faqs.question: Can I collect subscriber emails?
faqs.answer: Yes. Visitors can join your email list from the homepage and product pages to hear about new releases, promotions, and freebies.
